weaknesses: Limited evidence with senior technical stakeholders (CTO)
Few mentions of Snowflake production usage details
Less domain experience in investing/OEM/Big Tech
improvement_bullets: Integrated diverse data sources via APIs and Snowflake to design scalable data solutions, providing stakeholders with clean, actionable datasets for enterprise analytics.
Led end-to-end data initiative scoping and cross-functional execution, translating complex business requirements into technical briefs and data prototypes for R&D alignment.
Advised senior leadership on data refresh cadences and consumption frameworks, ensuring analytical models directly supported high-impact investment and product strategy decisions.
Architected POCs and data samples using SQL and Python to demonstrate value-driven use cases, effectively bridging the gap between raw data and business outcomes.
Collaborated with engineering and product teams to integrate and operationalize data pipelines, ensuring feasibility, performance, and scalability across multi-stakeholder environments.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Strategist - Data Strategy & Integration opportunity with Similarweb. I am interested in this opportunity because Similarweb’s ability to provide game-changing digital intelligence for industry leaders like Google and eBay resonates deeply with my background in data-driven storytelling and operational efficiency. What interests me about working for Similarweb is its unique position in revolutionizing digital interaction, which excites me because I am passionate about turning complex datasets into scalable, actionable impact. I believe my technical fluency in Python and SQL and my experience in cross-functional stakeholder management would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing clear communication and operational design. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I identified that manual reporting was a bottleneck; I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and automated workflows that reduced processing time by 40% and directly supported a 300% increase in customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Data Strategist role at Similarweb would allow me to bring my analytical prototyping skills to define data-driven solutions for your clients. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my technical integration skills. I collaborated with Product, UI/UX, and Underwriting teams to integrate data from APIs and PostgreSQL, ensuring that data structures were reliable for engineers and stakeholders, resulting in a 25% reduction in project delivery delays. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my background in data modeling and strategy in working on use-case design and technical project management at Similarweb. I know that my data architecture expertise and my ability to translate technical concepts into business value align with what it takes to succeed at the Data Strategist role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
